subject: RE: humbly asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |

| |

| | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd5c/3eb3e2fc/4cb91492/7449c77b/247096302/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/juliandebate?refcode=20190429_em_fr_b2_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")

[_**I 'm about to ask you for $15 before my monumental End of Month Deadline in 24 hours to help me meet the criteria for the Democratic debates. But first, please let me explain why it's so important:**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd5c/3eb3e2fc/4cb91492/7449c77a/247096302/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/juliandebate?refcode=20190427_em_fr_b2_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")

Growing up on the West Side of San Antonio, my family never had it easy.

The odds were stacked against us from the start.

My grandmother immigrated to this country as an orphan when she was 7. She cleaned houses to provide for us.

**She never could have imagined her grandson would one day run for President -- but that 's the American Dream for you. **

More than anything, I want to reach that debate stage for my grandmother -- and for every struggling American who doesn't think they have anyone speaking for them.

Before my critical End of Month Deadline in 24 hours, will you chip in $15 to help me reach the debate stage?

| [**Chip in $15 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd5c/3eb3e2fc/4cb91492/7449c779/247096302/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/juliandebate?refcode=20190429_em_fr_b2_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=15")

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm opting out of an unwritten rule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
If we keep letting big money control our campaigns, we'll keep seeing Washington only work for people who can afford to hire armies of lobbyists and lawyers. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fe5a/45c30650/8ca790aa/66965dcd/2396350042/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
I'll just be blunt: I'm about to ask if you can make a donation to our campaign. But first, can you give me a minute to explain why it would make a real difference to help hit our April fundraising goal?

Here's the way I see it: Our campaign is based on big ideas and a core principle -- everyone gets equal access because we're fighting for a government that works for everyone.

Our democracy is not for sale, and neither is my time.

So I'm opting out of the unwritten rule of politics that says I'm supposed to run for office by sucking up to rich donors on Wall Street and powerful interests in Washington.

I'm not hosting swanky fundraisers where you can only get in if you write a ginormous check. I'm not taking PAC money, donations from federal lobbyists, or applications from billionaires who want to run a Super PAC on my behalf.

**If we keep letting big money control our campaigns, we 'll keep seeing Washington only work for people who can afford to hire armies of lobbyists and lawyers.

We're fighting to change all that. We're building a grassroots movement to put power in the hands of the people, not the wealthy and well-connected.

[And it's only possible with contributions from people like you. I'm grateful from the bottom of my heart that you're on our team. Will you make a donation right now to help make sure we hit our April goal?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fe5a/45c30650/8ca790aa/66965dcc/2396350042/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZW9tIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQyOWVtMy1uby1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19eom?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190429em3-no-full")**

When we hit our fundraising goals -- dollar by dollar, month after month -- and keep building our movement -- face to face, person to person -- we show the rich and the powerful that change is coming. Sooner than they think.

Billionaires, CEOs, big banks, and giant corporations won't always run the show in Washington.

I've got a plan -- a bunch of plans -- to level the playing field for working people and make sure we're building a future not just for some of our kids, but all of our kids.

If the rich and powerful don't like it, then tough.

We've got to make big, structural change -- we're _going to_ -- but it'll take a massive grassroots movement to get it done.

We're ready to dream big and fight hard. I see it in people's faces all across the country, including in South Carolina, Texas, Iowa, and Nevada in the past week.

**But first, our next big test is the fundraising deadline tomorrow, and we need all hands on deck to hit our goal. If you can, please chip in:**

**[https://my.elizabethwarren.com/april-eom](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fe5a/45c30650/8ca790aa/66965dcf/2396350042/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiMjAxOTA0MjllbTMtbm8tZnVsbCJ9/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/april-eom?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190429em3-no-full")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| **[**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fe5a/45c30650/8ca790aa/66965dcc/2396350042/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZW9tIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQyOWVtMy1uby1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19eom?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190429em3-no-full")**
---

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I'm asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, when my friend Terry McAuliffe told the world that he was forgoing a presidential run to focus his efforts at home in the Commonwealth, he said that his heart was in Virginia.
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek:

[**I'm going to ask you to pitch in $10 to our efforts to flip Virginia's General Assembly.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1748/3e0906/7bfcd2c3/3e30b8f3/2846070341/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-2019-democrats?source=20190429_1_FR_TK_VA-Dems&amount=30&refcode=20190429_1_FR_TK_VA-Dems&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Im+going+to+ask+you+to+pitch+in+10+to+ou&utm_campaign=20190429_1_FR_TK_VA-Dems") **Here's why:**

This November, all 140 seats -- 40 in the Virginia Senate and 100 in the House of Delegates -- are up.

Right now, Republicans hold a 21-19 majority in the Senate and a 51-49 majority in the House of Delegates. That means we're in spitting distance of flipping not just one but both legislative chambers.

That would be a really big deal for families all across the Commonwealth. If we can break out of our current legislative gridlock, our representatives in Richmond can put into action so many of the ideas that we've been working on together.

After Democrats made huge gains in the historic 2017 elections, we saw incredible results. 400,000 more Virginians have access to health care! So just imagine what we'll see if we can go beyond re-electing our strong Democrats and actually flip those final few seats.

**I'm ready.**

**If you are too, I'm asking you to make an online donation today to help make it happen.** Your contribution will go directly to some of the organizations that are on the front lines of this fight: the Virginia House Democratic Caucus and the Virginia Senate Democratic Caucus. They're working every day to support our incumbent Democrats and our determined challengers -- _but they need your help_.

**Follow this secure link to make your contribution before April's end-of-month deadline:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-2019-democrats**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1748/3e0906/7bfcd2c3/3e30b8f2/2846070341/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-2019-democrats?source=20190429_1_FR_TK_VA-Dems&amount=30&refcode=20190429_1_FR_TK_VA-Dems&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureactbluecomdonatekaine2019demo&utm_campaign=20190429_1_FR_TK_VA-Dems")

Derek, when my friend Terry McAuliffe told the world that he was forgoing a presidential run to focus his efforts at home in the Commonwealth, he said that his heart was in Virginia. Well, so is mine. And together, we can show the rest of the country that Virginia truly is a place that works for all.

Thanks for stepping up today.

clean_body: Derek, when my friend Terry McAuliffe told the world that he was forgoing a presidential run to focus his efforts at home in the Commonwealth, he said that his heart was in Virginia. | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek: "" Here's why: This November, all 140 seats -- 40 in the Virginia Senate and 100 in the House of Delegates -- are up. Right now, Republicans hold a 21-19 majority in the Senate and a 51-49 majority in the House of Delegates. That means we're in spitting distance of flipping not just one but both legislative chambers. That would be a really big deal for families all across the Commonwealth. If we can break out of our current legislative gridlock, our representatives in Richmond can put into action so many of the ideas that we've been working on together. After Democrats made huge gains in the historic 2017 elections, we saw incredible results. 400,000 more Virginians have access to health care! So just imagine what we'll see if we can go beyond re-electing our strong Democrats and actually flip those final few seats. I'm ready. If you are too, I'm asking you to make an online donation today to help make it happen. Your contribution will go directly to some of the organizations that are on the front lines of this fight: the Virginia House Democratic Caucus and the Virginia Senate Democratic Caucus. They're working every day to support our incumbent Democrats and our determined challengers -- but they need your help. Follow this secure link to make your contribution before April's end-of-month deadline: "" Derek, when my friend Terry McAuliffe told the world that he was forgoing a presidential run to focus his efforts at home in the Commonwealth, he said that his heart was in Virginia. Well, so is mine. And together, we can show the rest of the country that Virginia truly is a place that works for all. Thanks for stepping up today. -Tim | ** "" | "" "" ""

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I want to know who stood with me when it mattered most. |

Friend,

Democrats wasted TWO YEARS investigating me and my administration, only to fail. **A TOTAL DISGRACE!**

While they spent their time conducting the world's BIGGEST WITCH HUNT, I was working for YOU and now America is WINNING AGAIN.
* Our economy is booming
* The Wall is being built
* And we are finally respected on the world stage again

America doesn't want to hear another word about the Mueller Report, unless it's an apology from the Left and their Fake News friends.

I want to do something so HUGE and so INCREDIBLE, that even their brainwashed followers won't be able to ignore how strong our movement is.

_Our April End-of-Month Deadline is coming up and I need YOUR help to raise $2,000,000 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to finish the month STRONG._

I want to know who stood with me when it mattered most so I've asked my team to send me a list of EVERY AMERICAN PATRIOT who donates.

name: Cory Booker
subject: Good morning! Can I ask you to start the day by making a quick, but meaningful, donation to our campaign before our April deadline?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I know it's early, team: We're getting a head start on the day because tonight's our April fundraising deadline. Tomorrow, we enter a new phase of this campaign -- and there's no looking back. **I want you to be part of this from the very start.[_Make your first donation right now -- and help lay the foundation of this underdog campaign._](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-apreom-20190430?refcode=em_fr_20190430_CB_20190430-fr-CB-deadline1-actives_2020ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _[](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-apreom-20190430?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20190430_CB_20190430-CB-fr-deadline1-actives_actives_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-apreom-20190430?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=em_fr_20190430_CB_20190430-CB-fr-deadline1-actives_actives_expresslane35&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-apreom-20190430?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20190430_CB_20190430-CB-fr-deadline1-actives_actives_expresslane50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-apreom-20190430?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20190430_CB_20190430-CB-fr-deadline1-actives_actives_expresslane100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-apreom-20190430?refcode=em_fr_20190430_CB_20190430-CB-fr-deadline1-actives_actives_expresslaneother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")_ The last few days have been a stark reminder that some political insiders are already counting us out. Joe Biden's entry into the race means we're competing with another frontrunner who has access to a steady stream of campaign cash. It's true that we have a harder time when it comes to fundraising. Our campaign has refused corporate PAC money and rejected donations from D.C. lobbyists because I have no interest in running a campaign that prioritizes the powerful over the people. We're not playing that game. No one owns a piece of what we're building except people like you. That makes deadlines like tonight's matter a lot more for a campaign like ours. So I have to ask you: [_**Before midnight, will you make your first donation to our campaign?**_](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-apreom-20190430?refcode=em_fr_20190430_CB_20190430-fr-CB-deadline1-actives_2020ndnr_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") No matter what, I want you to know your support means the world to me -- thank you, Cory
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76c7/5fca0d19/1cce41dd/291ac4d2/1350880747/VEsHBQ/ "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76c7/5fca0d19/1cce41dd/291ac4d1/1350880747/VEsHBA/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76c7/5fca0d19/1cce41dd/291ac4d0/1350880747/VEsHBw/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76c7/5fca0d19/1cce41dd/291ac4df/1350880747/VEsHBg/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76c7/5fca0d19/1cce41dd/291ac4de/1350880747/VEsHAQ/ "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76c7/5fca0d19/1cce41dd/291ac4d2/1350880747/VEsHAA/ "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Robert Foster
subject: Important day today
body:
We need your help before 5pm today
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| Friend,
We are approaching an important campaign filing deadline for fundraising today at 5pm!
And you already know we don't have the big lobbying and special interest money.
Instead, we have you - the people of Mississippi. And people like you are our greatest asset as we travel all corners of our great state.
[Would you help us reach our fundraising goal today by contributing $10, $25, or whatever you can afford before today's deadline at 5pm?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dbx1ns4hSwFW008wP_j4DYGd8t0awA-3p3vrWbubttwC5haVuZxvCGFFTes2K7tR7tZ-Wt4KctNhAAWIBISbtjZv76EOON77x_l_odwfD4rgc4J_pbMlCiSrC6Uwt-go87XXxV86-V62IdtI7mrJhYA8Fv5d4RKkYhVXMO1ngkQsi5n_UfbvlF65XOmc794IY9ehUNbFnsJ2ipSAk_vmuUgNeEuqlYRm&c=FV9i7oexbTHg1nc-32CqDL270m3lgC7GCMpucSGkR88rfPTRaZlqrg==&ch=2MW8un6cnevwJeJL2Tgbz467L2aFdpyeH5VEeqSeZqKDWaZQv8MN-A==)
I love Mississippi and I am committed to taking this state to the next level. As a businessman, farmer, and political outsider, I truly believe with your help and my new vision we can make our state a better place to live, hire an employee, and raise a family.
Mississippians deserve a fair shake and I'm here to promise you one.
---
| Sincerely,

|

| |

name: Meg, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: our first finance reporting deadline is TONIGHT
body:
|
---
Friend,

I'm reaching out because I'm in a bit of a bind: With only a few more hours until our first finance reporting deadline, we're still $12,814 short of reaching our monthly goal. [**Can you pitch in anything you can to help us catch up? There's a donor match in effect, so anything you give now will be doubled!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BzEityihkp5aufW0WGORfqneE3EJmcIEPeuUIksnYmU=/YImDUvuyZqcUYePA2t4alq1HC7S71xEAAYHkODClq6c=?refcode=20190430.1&amount=25)

**This reporting deadline is the first real test of Jim 's campaign, friend.** Everyone is going to be comparing our numbers to our opponent's when the finance reports are released publicly, so we need to prove that this campaign has what it takes to WIN in November.

This is absolutely a winnable campaign. **Jim has led in the polls since the very beginning** , but we have to make sure he stays in the lead until the last voter has cast their ballot.

And given the amount of money in Tate Reeves' war chest -- _plus the fact that he 's already taken out a six-figure TV ad buy against Jim_ \-- **we have to meet every single goal we set**. We don't need to match Reeves' fundraising dollar-for-dollar, but we DO need enough to be able to run an all-out grassroots campaign and get Jim's supporters to the polls.

**And with the donor match active until midnight, now is the perfect time to give! So friend, will you rush a matched donation now to help us reach our monthly fundraising goal and prove that Jim has what it takes to beat Tate Reeves in November?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Express donate $100>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/BzEityihkp5aufW0WGORfqneE3EJmcIEPeuUIksnYmU=/YImDUvuyZqcUYePA2t4alq1HC7S71xEAAYHkODClq6c=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190430.1&amount=100)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/BzEityihkp5aufW0WGORfqneE3EJmcIEPeuUIksnYmU=/YImDUvuyZqcUYePA2t4alq1HC7S71xEAAYHkODClq6c=?refcode=20190430.1)**
Thank you,

Meg Scribner
Deputy Campaign Manager, Hood for Mississippi

subject: I'd never forgive myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I asked.
Nancy Pelosi asked. Adam Schiff asked. Now I'm asking again --_for the 5th time. _ **That 's how important tonight's deadline is for me. ** I'd never forgive myself if I allowed President Trump and Mitch McConnell to take this Senate seat away from our Democrats -- but they're making unprecedented moves to steal it. Which is why hitting my first end-of-month goal tonight is absolutely pivotal to keeping this Senate seat in Democrats' hands -- I'm only 1,356 gifts short. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b57b/18e32a7f/5a0b4918/7b871134/4075857723/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190430_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
[ _**Suggested Support: $10**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b57b/18e32a7f/5a0b4918/7b871134/4075857723/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190430_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
---

I'm not just asking for me.

I'm asking because I know our Medicare, our kids' education, our social safety net, our very Democracy -- they're all on the line if we let Republicans control the Senate.

This is the most important deadline I've ever faced. Will you rush $10 before tomorrow?

Peter, I need your help. Midnight tonight is our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and I just got word that we're about to miss our April goal.
We have just 407 more donors to go--**[please donate in these final few hours to make sure I'm on the debate stage and to power this people-first campaign to defeat Trump.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9770b5/2ae112ef/6e274f60/357c3e8a/1736706347/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwNjAtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3060-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

| | I asked --_three times._ My mom Rosie asked -- _twice. _ Now I'm asking one more time. [_**Because we 're about to make history. Before my End of Month Deadline hits at midnight, will you rush $15 and be one of the last donors I need to participate in the Democratic debates? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd5d/3eb3e2fc/4d4c11bc/7449c7da/1862887377/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/juliandebate?refcode=20190430_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") I know perfectly well I'm not a frontrunner in this race. But I wasn't born a frontrunner. My family never had anything handed to us. And even though no one like me has ever been on that debate stage -- even though many people underestimated us... _**You 're about to prove them all wrong and officially carry me onto that debate stage. **_ If I can get one final surge of support before tonight's deadline, we'll make history. name: Andrew Yang
subject: Progress in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | Friend --
[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=1)[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=2) Hello and thank you for the support! We just got back from 4 days in Iowa. As you know, Iowa is the first state to vote and will be crucial in 2020. I have been visiting Iowa since last summer, when I spoke at the [Wing Ding](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZQinFnNYoCZRZMNy4dMRm6&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=3 "Andrew Yang at the Iowa Wing Ding"). I have returned every month since. This time was different. We drew a crowd of hundreds to a Town Hall in Des Moines with JD Scholten, a political icon in Iowa who is fighting for the working class. People drove from hours away to attend. The crowd included people wearing [MATH hats](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=OJW7B7dIawl8qH5Qk_BYPVbIqSoKvhh0mHbfGo46lSSnSNoFzl9w-QhsmPLSfhUO_wxIrWKjxMKYr_cfjDXFQK0btuiBfFkYysiXUgdMiuE&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=4 "Buy a MATH hat") and people who were simply curious. Among the things I heard from excited Iowans: _“My son told me I had to come see you. He’s already decided to caucus for you.”_ _“I read your book and have been giving it to everyone I know.”_ _“You converted me.”_ _“You will be the first person I ever caucus for.”_ Folks then waited for up to an hour afterwards for selfies and to meet. That wasn’t happening in 2018. I also spoke at the Democracy Ball in Boone County, a rural forum in Stuart, and several other events. Everywhere we went there was a ton of energy and interest in the campaign. It felt very much like we had turned a corner. We weren’t alone—journalists from the Washington Post and Politico were with us tracking the campaign. That wasn’t happening in 2018 either. We will compete in Iowa as our campaign gains traction. I made appearances on CNN and [MSNBC](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uMdfrsu_sbvlXpaGhkswPVF8KhEsN3qhgUmBpRj89HRGCsrs566yGPpzfd-Dsxshz87_l-dKs_kOxHaq2kuzYwc6FUsaP_1C3N1muWWximXBlYn9KsfeYWg2kpX_edvtpVGJ-EvWDdbCPHnGy0GFVw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=5 "Where Andrew Yang
stands on 2020 issues") from Des Moines. We are growing all of the time. But we need your help. Though our April fundraising is ahead of our Q1 pace of $1.7 million, it is not growing fast enough. We will have to demonstrate major growth in order to contend in the days ahead. If you have the ability to do so, [please do make a donation today](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcOWEwrQ9Q8HC2J9xvBG708Rg&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=6 "Andrew Yang's ActBlue Donation Page"). This is particularly important if you haven’t donated, as we are trying to reach 200,000 donors by the debates in June. You can also [buy some swag](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=OJW7B7dIawl8qH5Qk_BYPdZOD3rcdyLajlHu8vwhEMw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=7 "Yang2020 Store")—we are told that people shout “Yang Gang!” at you on the street if they spot a fellow supporter. Your donation will pay off. We are already polling at 3% in [Texas](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=fVc8ucaySv8SFEdMhk87O-J7Kfx-4kCDXGvdbkDZpGFpUhfd0KOD6tCQUILvrUxU3m_pGmKrrvm7yMVJuXaouVzwtLwNBGFbIszYk5Q21s8knw04CR7eyft0cAX4pCuNx0KViNHTjmv1kcOLnOVTYQ&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=8 "Emerson Polling for Texas") and [Nevada](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv_dKpqHc6ZrOOHa-AJv_7lGqhK48I6hSOQk2A99yzRnXRWZyxRO48DqaFDYo-XBh1YnZFzYcukPWM7YOW_u7D831dK6cbZjrRF1fXAoE0t3tiaBnzXcV367neTXNA0oBdA&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=9), and the New York Times recently [noted](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=PiInCVHjZg_Lhb0RQ-dhd2zXrUvy-aBRfZKMgScLe_xL6lfQ--1jD1-nfu3CNxKBGT8TwvJwkCsrak0Sgt8Ce3O9gH2bDSSTIiT9t7Ax_YDAO5HC0IDMY1ORJrF96iq6&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=10) that we are one of only 8 candidates to qualify for the debates via both polling and donations. We are drawing crowds of hundreds or even thousands to our [Humanity First rallies](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=c5dAo5qulKAncvNYjq2uGcnHAN92nM1CHInwgA-PIi7HdTRyEez5JIs0AF2zI3zA&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=11 "Humanity First Tour Schedule") around the country. This week we will be in [Seattle](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWdikqgOEmv95as43Y58cghcUJkVmfetEAp2sK9sThwBXl6kF9b220zNTt1ymCeJCsZOe56OrYKLWUp764mKCE5A&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=12 "Andrew Yang's Humanity First Rally in Seattle"), [Detroit](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWdikqgOEmv95as43Y58cghePf9lMScPeEghyrDEJTI372Jo_PAP0tilgrUxF9-_kIhZdxRNpjs9OINDEUSjPWdOqhtCqG3Dl8BRJiUq-EIXY&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=13 "Andrew Yang's Humanity First Rally in Detroit"), and [Minneapolis](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWdikqgOEmv95as43Y58cghfQNMwNimpI6IcIFBC904TiQMcwbKUEVi49gZIY2_StcdgI8QQPhoX7uuq0QjXCUcw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=14 "Minneapolis") before heading to [New Hampshire](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWdikqgOEmv95as43Y58cghcJi4I3M29agsQZD5VrgJcrihacQvqo5UYlve3QGpfuy9lEKC1sZq2w1cZBAj1Nx6w&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=15 "Andrew Yang's Humanity First Tour in
Portsmouth") and our biggest rally yet in [New York City](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWdikqgOEmv95as43Y58cghf92CPOI7pOoedoIqdOGAc6xUoSty6OWRxsrXn5Uz0RNzDr1f5Qjsj1hZQfbdRmW3g&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=16 "Andrew Yang's
Humanity First Tour in NYC"). We can change the course of our nation’s history. But we will have to dig deep—and demonstrate ourselves that people matter more than money. Americans are hungry for this message. I see it every day. On a personal level, I appreciate your donations because they mean that we can demonstrate our grassroots support, and I can focus on growing our base instead of doing the money chase. It is incredibly empowering. You all make me stronger. Let’s show what we can do. \- Andrew
---

**Can you make a donation today?**

Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people.

**Join the Yang Gang!**

If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application [here](https://my.yang2020.com/yang_gang_app?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04302019_newsletter_2&n=20) and someone from our team will reach out.

|

clean_body: | | Friend -- Hello and thank you for the support! We just got back from 4 days in Iowa. As you know, Iowa is the first state to vote and will be crucial in 2020. I have been visiting Iowa since last summer, when I spoke at the "Andrew Yang at the Iowa Wing Ding". I have returned every month since. This time was different. We drew a crowd of hundreds to a Town Hall in Des Moines with JD Scholten, a political icon in Iowa who is fighting for the working class. People drove from hours away to attend. The crowd included people wearing "Buy a MATH hat" and people who were simply curious. Among the things I heard from excited Iowans: “My son told me I had to come see you. He’s already decided to caucus for you.” “I read your book and have been giving it to everyone I know.” “You converted me.” “You will be the first person I ever caucus for.” Folks then waited for up to an hour afterwards for selfies and to meet. That wasn’t happening in 2018. I also spoke at the Democracy Ball in Boone County, a rural forum in Stuart, and several other events. Everywhere we went there was a ton of energy and interest in the campaign. It felt very much like we had turned a corner. We weren’t alone—journalists from the Washington Post and Politico were with us tracking the campaign. That wasn’t happening in 2018 either. We will compete in Iowa as our campaign gains traction. I made appearances on CNN and "Where Andrew Yang stands on 2020 issues" from Des Moines. We are growing all of the time. But we need your help. Though our April fundraising is ahead of our Q1 pace of $1.7 million, it is not growing fast enough. We will have to demonstrate major growth in order to contend in the days ahead. If you have the ability to do so, "Andrew Yang's ActBlue Donation Page". This is particularly important if you haven’t donated, as we are trying to reach 200,000 donors by the debates in June. You can also "Yang2020 Store"—we are told that people shout “Yang Gang!” at you on the street if they spot a fellow supporter. Your donation will pay off. We are already polling at 3% in "Emerson Polling for Texas" and , and the New York Times recently that we are one of only 8 candidates to qualify for the debates via both polling and donations. We are drawing crowds of hundreds or even thousands to our "Humanity First Tour Schedule" around the country. This week we will be in "Andrew Yang's Humanity First Rally in Seattle", "Andrew Yang's Humanity First Rally in Detroit", and "Minneapolis" before heading to "Andrew Yang's Humanity First Tour in Portsmouth" and our biggest rally yet in "Andrew Yang's Humanity First Tour in NYC". We can change the course of our nation’s history. But we will have to dig deep—and demonstrate ourselves that people matter more than money. Americans are hungry for this message. I see it every day. On a personal level, I appreciate your donations because they mean that we can demonstrate our grassroots support, and I can focus on growing our base instead of doing the money chase. It is incredibly empowering. You all make me stronger. Let’s show what we can do. \- Andrew Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang. All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am asking you to make a contribution today to win this election and transform our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
There is a good reason the political and financial establishment of this country are gearing up to stop our campaign.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1210%2E150750%2EdTtkea)

**I hope that you will read my letter below on why we are going to win this election. But at the same time, please know that I cannot do this alone. We have an important deadline tonight at midnight. It would mean a lot if you could make a $3 contribution before it ends.**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10584?refcode=em190430-1-15&t=3&akid=1210%2E150750%2EdTtkea)

Sisters, Brothers, and Friends -
There is a good reason the political and financial establishment of this country are gearing up to stop our campaign:
**It is because we are going to win.**
And the reason we are going to win is because we are telling the truth about the reality of American life today.
We are talking about a reality in which almost all of the wealth and income in this country is going to the top 1 percent.
We are talking about a dysfunctional health care system that prioritizes the profits of healthy industry CEOs and stock prices over the need to provide quality care for everyone in a cost-effective way.
We are talking about the tragedy for our nation that hundreds of thousands of bright young people who have the desire and ability to get a college education will not be able to do so because their families lack the money.
We are talking about a reality where the top 25 hedge fund managers in this country make more money than the combined salaries of every kindergarten teacher and billionaires get huge tax breaks while our children get broken chairs, flooded classrooms and inadequate support staff in their schools.
We are talking about a fossil fuel industry that continues to make huge profits while their carbon emissions destroy the planet for our children and grandchildren.
We are talking about a corrupt system of campaign finance that allows a few wealthy individuals and corporations to buy our candidates and our elections. Today, virtually no piece of legislation can get passed unless it has their approval.
**The billionaire class in this country has never had it so well, and they see us as an existential threat to their profits and to their way of life. And they are right – we are.**
That is why they are willing to do anything and spend unlimited amounts of money to stop our campaign.
But we have something they don’t have, and that is the people.
And together, what we are proving is that you don’t have to run around the country hustling millionaires and billionaires for money.
We are funding this campaign in an unprecedented fashion — by bringing millions of people together, working people, young people, all chipping in to support our campaign that promises to transform this country.
But that means I need your help, because I cannot do this alone:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign before our monthly fundraising deadline comes to a close at midnight tonight? This is important.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10584?refcode=em190430-1-15&t=28&akid=1210%2E150750%2EdTtkea)
Brothers and sisters, if we stand together, there is no limit to what we can accomplish.
We can defeat Donald Trump and repair the damage he has done to our country.
We can create a nation that leads the world in the struggle for peace and for economic, racial, social and environmental justice.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**Please make a $3 contribution before tonight's midnight fundraising deadline comes to an end.**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10584?refcode=em190430-1-15&t=30&akid=1210%2E150750%2EdTtkea)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=31&akid=1210%2E150750%2EdTtkea). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=32&akid=1210%2E150750%2EdTtkea). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=33&refcode2=1210_150750_dTtkea&akid=1210%2E150750%2EdTtkea).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=34&akid=1210%2E150750%2EdTtkea).

name: Team Beto
subject: Leveling with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

We want to level with you about fundraising. No one doubts that we have
the people or support to raise what we need. We’ve proven that time and
time again. Team Beto has donated millions of dollars — all without PACs
or special interests.

But lately our fundraising has slowed down. If we don’t pick up the pace,
we will be heavily outspent. In a time of 30-second TV ads and super PACs,
the only way forward for Beto and our country is to run a people-powered
effort like we’ve never seen before.

We had lofty goals for fundraising headed into April, and we may not make
them. But we need to try our best right now to close the
gap. Emails like this one generate about half of all the
money we’ve raised so far, but only 1-in-100 people reading any given
email end up donating.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17479?refcode=ema20190430-29180&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=29180%2E444211%2EBXAHJK ]Can Beto count on you now to be one of the people who steps up to own
a part of this grassroots campaign? Make a $3 contribution
right now to help give us the resources we need to compete.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17479?refcode=ema20190430-29180&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29180%2E444211%2EBXAHJK ]Contribute $3

From the beginning, Beto said this campaign would be funded by all people.
No PACs. No corporations. No lobbyists. We’re holding true to that
promise. But we have to face the realities about the flood of money for
our competitors.

A couple of candidates already had big super PACs backing them. And just
this week, a new super PAC was founded to funnel unlimited sums of money
into our political process to support Joe Biden’s campaign.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17479?refcode=ema20190430-29180&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=29180%2E444211%2EBXAHJK ]We need your help right now to pick up our pace so we don’t get
heavily outspent. Add a $3 contribution right now so that
we can run the strongest possible grassroots campaign for president.

We're trying to campaign the right way — the real way — by traveling
across the country and listening to Americans, and by relying on the
support of regular, everyday people chipping in what they can afford.

When Beto’s campaign succeeds and we are elected to the White House, it’ll
be because people like you decided to click on emails like these and make
it happen.

Thank you for all you are doing.

- Team Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17479?refcode=ema20190430-29180&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=29180%2E444211%2EBXAHJK ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190430footer&t=1023&refcode2=29180_444211_BXAHJK&akid=29180%2E444211%2EBXAHJK

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=29180%2E444211%2EBXAHJK

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Ivanka Trump: Empowered Women Pave the Way to Economic Progress
body:
“We will work to achieve this goal by supporting women in the workplace, helping them succeed as entrepreneurs, and by advancing legal reforms..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d5c94409a1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Ivanka Trump: Empowered Women Pave the Way to Economic Progress**

“I recently traveled to Africa to advance the White House's Women's Global Development and Prosperity Initiative, or W-GDP, which seeks to reach 50 million women in the developing world by 2025,” Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump writes.

“We will work to achieve this goal by supporting women in the workplace, helping them succeed as entrepreneurs, and by advancing legal reforms that will create greater gender equality . . . Despite the incredible difficulties they face, women in Africa are already transcending poverty, creating jobs, and pioneering a brighter future. Now, we want to empower them.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=37d92179b7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=655662c23a&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Anna Giaritelli reports that human smugglers are running radio ads in Central America offering to transport people into the United States. “The word is definitely out,” a U.S. Border Patrol agent told Maria Bartiromo on Fox News. The Department of Homeland Security “estimates unauthorized immigrants are spending nearly $10,000 to hire a human smuggler to travel from Central America in an attempt to enter the U.S. illegally,” bankrolling criminal enterprises.
---
|
---
| “Consumer spending in March rose at the highest rate in close to a decade, according to data released Monday by the Commerce Department,” Sylvan Lane reports in _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b78440a3a3&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Spending on consumer goods rose $123.5 billion in March, a 0.9 percent increase, reflecting strength in one of the most crucial forces behind U.S. economic growth.”
---
|
---
| “As Ronald Reagan foretold a generation ago, it is morning again in America. Today’s booming economy, under President Donald J. Trump, stands in stark contrast to the stagnation and volatility Americans endured over the past decade,” [Housing and Urban Development Secretary Ben Carson](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f2d234f93a&e=3ee4985eea) writes in _RealClearPolicy_. “Few programs in modern American history have the potential to touch the lives of so many people as powerfully as Opportunity Zones, which are now home to approximately 31.3 million Americans in all 50 states and the District of Columbia — or roughly 10% of the country.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dbe83810e3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=812ef53910&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=d609ad4f17)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Lauren Hitt, Team Hickenlooper
subject: This isn't up for debate:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
A big, essential part of being able to make the most of the debates is having the resources we need to elevate John's vision and grow this team. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377166e/691c9bd/6c5da38a/11a49bc8/2493648046/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

I'm Lauren, the campaign's Communications Director. It's my job to figure out every way I can to get John's message out across the country--to supporters, to reporters, and to the communities that are counting on him most.

**One of the best upcoming opportunities for Americans to hear that message is in the June DNC debates.** John is already preparing to articulate his vision and show his passion and commitment to ending our crisis of division and delivering the progressive solutions Americans need more urgently than ever.

But a big, essential part of qualifying for those debates is building a team that's 65,000 supporters strong. [**_To stay on track toward that goal, we need 179 new supporters to make their first contribution before tonight's April fundraising deadline--can we count on you today?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377166e/691c9bd/6c5da38a/11a49bc9/2493648046/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190430_LH_20190430-fr-LH-debate-ndnr_ndnr_l1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

John is eager to take the stage in Miami and share his policies and priorities relating to health care, climate change, common-sense gun reform, a living wage, and other issues demanding our urgent attention. With his experience and his track record as a proven leader, we feel confident he'll leave a powerful impression on voters as they start really getting to know the field in this primary.

[**_But first, he needs your help getting there. Before midnight, can you make your first contribution to this campaign?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377166e/691c9bd/6c5da38a/11a49bc6/2493648046/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190430_LH_20190430-fr-LH-debate-ndnr_ndnr_l2&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Lauren

Lauren Hitt
Communications Director
Team Hickenlooper [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377166e/691c9bd/6c5da38a/11a49bc7/2493648046/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190430_LH_20190430-fr-LH-debate-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

** **
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377166e/691c9bd/6c5da38a/11a49bc4/2493648046/VEsD/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377166e/691c9bd/6c5da38a/11a49bc5/2493648046/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377166e/691c9bd/6c5da38a/11a49bc2/2493648046/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377166e/691c9bd/6c5da38a/11a49bc3/2493648046/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377166e/691c9bd/6c5da38a/11a49bc0/2493648046/VEsP/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377166e/691c9bd/6c5da38a/11a49bc1/2493648046/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377166e/691c9bd/6c5da38a/11a49bc4/2493648046/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

"=" Thank you, Lauren Lauren Hitt Communications Director Team Hickenlooper "=" | | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020 PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206 Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible. name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Two keys points for April 30:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | | Following up on our push to end Mitch McConnell's tenure as Senate Majority Leader, here are two key points I can't stress enough right now:
* To make the Senate work again, not only do we have to defeat McConnell in Kentucky, but we have to win coast to coast, including right here in Oregon.

* We're only 15 hours from our April fundraising deadline.

[**Your grassroots donations are making all the difference as we launch this campaign. Stand with me and chip in $3 today.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2aeef/6cd27893/4aa65f7f/15801095/625314960/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-04-30-eom&recurring=1&amount=3") _**Jeff**_ Forwarded Message First, it was an all-out confirmation blockade, refusing to confirm any Obama nominees to the D.C. Circuit, often called the nation's second-most important court. Then, of course, there was the unprecedented theft of a Supreme Court seat, the shameless stonewalling of Merrick Garland. Then using the "nuclear option" to ram through confirmation of a Supreme Court justice with little debate. Now the nuclear option again, this time to enable him to dramatically increase the rate at which Trump nominees get confirmed, with little scrutiny and virtually no debate. **Mitch McConnell _must_ go. The only way to guarantee that? Defeat him. Win here in Oregon. Win _everywhere._ ** [**Please donate $3 right now and let's end McConnell's reign of obstruction.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2aeef/6cd27893/4aa65f7f/15801095/625314960/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-04-30-eom&recurring=1&amount=3") _Jeff_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2aeef/6cd27893/4aa65f7f/15801092/625314960/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-04-30-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2aeef/6cd27893/4aa65f7f/15801093/625314960/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-04-30-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2aeef/6cd27893/4aa65f7f/15801090/625314960/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-04-30-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2aeef/6cd27893/4aa65f7f/15801091/625314960/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-04-30-eom&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Dick Durbin
subject: America's caregivers and their families need our support (add your name)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[It's time for Congress to provide America's caregivers and their families with resources and support. Add your name now.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4d44/42ab3cf4/7c3d38a5/135d616f/4291308437/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-caregivers?source=em190430&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Peter,
More than 34 million Americans are serving as dedicated home caregivers for their loved ones, whether it's a parent or spouse struggling with Alzheimer's disease or a child with special needs.
These caregivers are devoting their time to meeting others' needs, which can carry significant emotional and financial burdens. It's time that we give these heroic caregivers some care too.
**[Join me in standing up for these Americans who are making sacrifices to care for their loved ones. Tell Congress to pass the Supporting America's Caregivers and Families Act.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4d44/42ab3cf4/7c3d38a5/135d616f/4291308437/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-caregivers?source=em190430&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
This legislation will provide additional funding for caregiver support programs and ensure home caregivers receive the training and support they need to care for their loved ones.
Hardworking, dedicated home caregivers are already doing so much. We have the power to ease some of the burden off of their shoulders and show that America has their backs.
**[Our caregivers and their families need our help. Sign on now to show your support.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4d44/42ab3cf4/7c3d38a5/135d616f/4291308437/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-caregivers?source=em190430&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Add My Name](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4d44/42ab3cf4/7c3d38a5/135d616f/4291308437/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-caregivers?source=em190430&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4d44/42ab3cf4/7c3d38a5/135d6150/4291308437/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4d44/42ab3cf4/7c3d38a5/135d6151/4291308437/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Joe Biden 2020
subject: did you catch this note from Joe?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b4c/1cd0ac28/4f9b63cd/356bd9fd/932670620/VEsH/ "https://www.joebiden.com")
---
_[Did you catch this email from Joe? He emailed you because tonight's deadline is really important. If you've been planning to make your first donation, please do so before tonight's midnight end-of-month deadline:](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b4c/1cd0ac28/4f9b63cd/356bd9fc/932670620/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190430JBfwd-b2_FDR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190430JBfwd&utm_content=b2_FDR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=25")_
* * *
Peter,

Here's how I see it: Our country is locked in a battle for the soul of this nation.

In the two years since I left the White House, we've seen this Administration praise neo-Nazis and white supremacists and rip families apart at the border.

This isn't who we are. I want to get this country back on track, but I can't do it without your support.

Our campaign's first end of month deadline is less than [24 hours away](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b4c/1cd0ac28/4f9b63cd/356bd9fc/932670620/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190430JBfwd-b2_FDR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190430JBfwd&utm_content=b2_FDR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=25") and my team tells me we need to raise $75,000 more to hit our goal.

[Peter, that's why I'm reaching out to you personally. Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b4c/1cd0ac28/4f9b63cd/356bd9fb/932670620/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190430JBfwd-b2_FDR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190430JBfwd&utm_content=b2_FDR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=5") | | [**$5**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b4c/1cd0ac28/4f9b63cd/356bd9fb/932670620/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190430JBfwd-b2_FDR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190430JBfwd&utm_content=b2_FDR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=5")

Folks, I can honestly say that I am more optimistic today than when I got elected to the United States Senate as a 29-year old kid.

There is no reason we can't own the 21st century. _We just have to get out of our own way and remember who we are._

We're Americans: tough, resilient, but always full of hope. It's time to treat each other with dignity. Build a middle class that works for everybody. Fight back against the incredible abuses of power we're seeing. It's time to dig deep and remember that our best days still lie ahead.

Peter, together, we will restore this version of America. I promise you that.

**But the strength of this movement depends on you. Can you stand with me and chip in $5?**
| [**$5**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b4c/1cd0ac28/4f9b63cd/356bd9fb/932670620/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190430JBfwd-b2_FDR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190430JBfwd&utm_content=b2_FDR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=5")

I hope you will join me on this journey. It's time for a new day in America.

\- _Joe_

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b4c/1cd0ac28/4f9b63cd/356bd9f2/932670620/VEsEAQ/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-email"). We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Jim Hood
subject: Tonight’s deadline
body:
|
---
I need your help, friend.

Tonight is the first finance reporting deadline of the year. This is a pivotal moment for our campaign and our chance to show the strength of our support -- [**so I 'm asking you to make a contribution before midnight tonight.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/PbloDaOrdM2oSXC9zVpVlA5wG24rltXq2bsdLomVPa4=/TNhfwf3l_XW0pZZiuJ0nto-5TOMh8vL4SryApnEY6F4=?refcode=20190430.2&amount=25)

I'm running for governor because Mississippians haven't been getting what they need year after year, and we deserve better. We need better roads and bridges. We need better access to health care. We need better pay for our teachers and better schools to prepare our state for a changing economy.

There are going to be people who will say that it can't be done. But I'm running to fight for working families -- and I will get it done.

I know that together, we can win this race. But if we're going to make it all the way to Election Day, I need you to pitch in whatever you can before tonight's big deadline. **Will you make a contribution right now?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/PbloDaOrdM2oSXC9zVpVlA5wG24rltXq2bsdLomVPa4=/TNhfwf3l_XW0pZZiuJ0nto-5TOMh8vL4SryApnEY6F4=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190430.2&amount=10)**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/PbloDaOrdM2oSXC9zVpVlA5wG24rltXq2bsdLomVPa4=/TNhfwf3l_XW0pZZiuJ0nto-5TOMh8vL4SryApnEY6F4=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190430.2&amount=25)**

**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/PbloDaOrdM2oSXC9zVpVlA5wG24rltXq2bsdLomVPa4=/TNhfwf3l_XW0pZZiuJ0nto-5TOMh8vL4SryApnEY6F4=?refcode=20190430.2)**
Thank you for your continued support.

\-- Jim

| | | | | |

| Patriot,
We are almost at the end of President Trump's first term and it's a miracle he has been able to accomplish so much considering the radical liberals and mainstream fake news media have been stonewalling him at every turn.
The funny thing is what we are learning now, after the witch hunt to impeach President Trump:
* The Mueller report confirmed that there was NO COLLUSION.
* President Obama was the one to allow Russian interference in the 2016 elections.

I find it hilarious that it was the Democrat's MVP, former President Barack Obama, who actually allowed the Russian interference in the 2016 elections. This whole time they were looking for a scapegoat in President Trump when they should have been looking internally.
Frankly, I am outraged by this news, but not surprised. The radical left and fake news media have stage 4 Trump Derangement Syndrome, which hinders their ability to be objective.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Not me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Tomorrow, I'll be doing my style of "call time." So if you can chip in whatever is meaningful and realistic for you before our midnight deadline, keep an eye on your phone tomorrow. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ff9c/45c30650/8db66aa0/66964d4a/3245359169/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
Today's the deadline to hit our April fundraising goal. The pressure is on.

Most candidates would spend these final hours doing "call time" -- also known as calling wealthy donors and asking for money.

Not me.

I don't host any closed-door fundraisers with the wealthiest donors. I don't spend time on the phone buttering them up. Our democracy is not for sale, and neither is my time -- every supporter gets equal access and owns an equal piece of our movement.

**Tomorrow, I 'll be doing my style of "call time" -- thanking a few of the grassroots donors who give what they can, whether it's $5, $15, or $50.

[So if you can chip in whatever is meaningful and realistic for you before our midnight deadline, keep an eye on your phone tomorrow. If you get a call from an unknown number, pick up -- it might be me!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ff9c/45c30650/8db66aa0/66964d4d/3245359169/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZW9tIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQzMGVtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19eom?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190430em2-full")**

We're going to build a grassroots movement that's strong enough to make big, structural change in our economy, our government, and our democracy.

I believe in how we're doing this, and I believe in our power together.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| **[**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ff9c/45c30650/8db66aa0/66964d4d/3245359169/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZW9tIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQzMGVtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19eom?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190430em2-full")**

name: Kamala HQ
subject: Every hour that goes by
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Right now, the team is huddling at headquarters to figure out whether we’re going to reach our April fundraising target. We’re close, but it’s too early to call it as we inch closer to our goal. **[Will you pitch in a donation right now to support Kamala’s presidential campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190430-eom?refcode=ema190430-eom29-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&t=1&refcode2=4619_5755789_ee_41x&akid=4619%2E5755789%2Eee_41x)** At the top of every hour, our fundraising team quickly runs the numbers on the response to emails like this one to calculate how far away we are from our goal. That’s how important this goal is for our campaign -- it’s the difference between continuing to make big investments that build our campaign or falling short and making real cuts to the budget. **It isn’t too late to step up. Kamala is counting on each of us. body:
Peter – I thought I’d reach out
personally one more time tonight. I’ll be frank: we’re not where
we need to be.

My team just let me know we still need to raise $708 before
midnight. We need to hit every single fundraising goal between
now and 2020 so that Democrats can fight back against shady GOP
backers and hold onto the majority.

name: Brad Komar, Team Hickenlooper
subject: How we break through
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
A big, essential part of being able to make the most of the debates is having the resources we need to elevate John's vision and grow this team. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771662/691c9bd/6c5133e7/11a49851/3894501753/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team, my colleague Lauren reached out this morning to fill you in on our progress toward guaranteeing John a spot on the debate stage.

It's a message we need every supporter to hear before tonight's April fundraising deadline. We can't do this without you, friend. That's been true since we began this campaign, and it's true as I write this.

**_[Please take a look at Lauren's message, and then, if you can, help put us over the top tonight.](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771662/691c9bd/6c5133e7/11a4984e/3894501753/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190430_BK_20190430-fr-BK-debatetopper-ndnr_ndnr_l1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")_**

Thanks,
Brad

\----------------------
Team,

I'm Lauren, the campaign's Communications Director. It's my job to figure out every way I can to get John's message out across the country--to supporters, to reporters, and to the communities that are counting on him most.

**One of the best upcoming opportunities for Americans to hear that message is in the June DNC debates.** John is already preparing to articulate his vision and show his passion and commitment to ending our crisis of division and delivering the progressive solutions Americans need more urgently than ever.

But a big, essential part of qualifying for those debates is building a team that's 65,000 supporters strong. [**_To stay on track toward that goal, we need 179 new supporters to make their first contribution before tonight's April fundraising deadline--can we count on you today?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771662/691c9bd/6c5133e7/11a4984f/3894501753/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190430_BK_20190430-fr-BK-debatetopper-ndnr_ndnr_l2&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

John is eager to take the stage in Miami and share his policies and priorities relating to health care, climate change, common-sense gun reform, a living wage, and other issues demanding our urgent attention. With his experience and his track record as a proven leader, we feel confident he'll leave a powerful impression on voters as they start really getting to know the field in this primary.

[**_But first, he needs your help getting there. Before midnight, can you make your first contribution to this campaign?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771662/691c9bd/6c5133e7/11a4984c/3894501753/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190430_BK_20190430-fr-BK-debatetopper-ndnr_ndnr_l3&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Lauren

Lauren Hitt
Communications Director
Team Hickenlooper [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771662/691c9bd/6c5133e7/11a4984d/3894501753/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190430_LH_20190430-fr-LH-debate-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

** **
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771662/691c9bd/6c5133e7/11a4984a/3894501753/VEsA/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771662/691c9bd/6c5133e7/11a4984b/3894501753/VEsB/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771662/691c9bd/6c5133e7/11a49848/3894501753/VEsO/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771662/691c9bd/6c5133e7/11a49849/3894501753/VEsP/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771662/691c9bd/6c5133e7/11a49846/3894501753/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771662/691c9bd/6c5133e7/11a49847/3894501753/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771662/691c9bd/6c5133e7/11a4984a/3894501753/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

subject: FW: Tonight's Deadline

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
Here’s a number that should get your attention:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1218%2E150750%2EMoNpUD)

Friends -
Here’s a number that should get your attention:
At the end of the last fundraising deadline, Donald Trump reported that his campaign had raised $30 million.
Tonight at midnight we close the books on our first fundraising deadline since that report, and we’re hoping to generate as many individual donations as we can before it comes to an end.
That makes this midnight deadline an important time to add your first online contribution to our 2020 campaign. You can use this link:
[**https://act.berniesanders.com/go/April-deadline** ](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10584?refcode=em190430-2-15&t=2&akid=1218%2E150750%2EMoNpUD)
Thank you in advance for helping us close the gap before midnight. It's important.
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1218%2E150750%2EMoNpUD). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1218%2E150750%2EMoNpUD). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1218_150750_MoNpUD&akid=1218%2E150750%2EMoNpUD).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=6&akid=1218%2E150750%2EMoNpUD).

name: =?utf-8?B?8J+TjSBTcGFuYmVyZ2VyIGZvciBDb25ncmVzcyBIUQ==?=
subject: One thing we’re certain of
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
All too often, when pundits talk about our campaign, they gloss over a critical part of our victory: This grassroots network.
| | Peter,

All too often, when pundits talk about our campaign, they gloss over a critical part of our victory: **This grassroots network.** They weren't on the ground with us knocking doors, rallying voters, or handing out yard signs to our friends, family, and neighbors. They weren't part of the district-wide movement we built from the ground up.

Some of us were active in local politics for years. Others decided to get involved in elections for the very first time in support of Abigail's candidacy.

**But, we went through the ups and downs together.** From cheering on Abigail during the general election debate to defending her record and reputation when special interests came knocking, this team stood tall and united -- stepping up to help out in times when the outcome was uncertain.

**Peter -- We 're facing another one of those times today.** [**In just 3 hours, we close the books on another month of fundraising and take one step closer to the test of re-election. But we 're still $4,716 away from our April goal, and right now it's unclear if we'll get there. Can you help us reach our target by chipping in before midnight? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2ljavL1gQfINy0LLteF_VR28ESpjOGyMqknDHJWvkIY=/7HSF1lSjVhfI38FNvC8UuWsIMn1V2nB_9VqiJwzjH8E=?refcode=em_fr_2019.04.30_b1_ts_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/2ljavL1gQfINy0LLteF_VR28ESpjOGyMqknDHJWvkIY=/7HSF1lSjVhfI38FNvC8UuWsIMn1V2nB_9VqiJwzjH8E=?refcode=em_fr_2019.04.30_b1_ts_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)
---
Here's the honest truth: There is going to be a lot of uncertainty between now and Election Day. Don't forget -- **our district is a pure toss-up.** The winds can shift the moment a special interest group jumps in with a misleading mail piece or spends big money trying to sway the race with a negative attack ad.

But one thing we're certain of is that this grassroots team will be there every step of the way, doing whatever is possible to keep Abigail in Washington fighting for our shared values. We'll bring new voices to the table, energize first-time voters, and build bridges across partisan divides -- _and we 'll do it all without a cent of corporate PAC money._
[**Peter, with $4,716 left to raise before the month of April ends, can we count on you to make a small donation of $15, $35, $50, or whatever works for you? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2ljavL1gQfINy0LLteF_VR28ESpjOGyMqknDHJWvkIY=/7HSF1lSjVhfI38FNvC8UuWsIMn1V2nB_9VqiJwzjH8E=?refcode=em_fr_2019.04.30_b1_ts_all&amount=35&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/2ljavL1gQfINy0LLteF_VR28ESpjOGyMqknDHJWvkIY=/7HSF1lSjVhfI38FNvC8UuWsIMn1V2nB_9VqiJwzjH8E=?refcode=em_fr_2019.04.30_b1_ts_all&amount=35&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)
---
Thanks for always standing with us. We truly appreciate everything you do.

_\-- Team Spanberger_

| Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/2ljavL1gQfINy0LLteF_VR28ESpjOGyMqknDHJWvkIY=/I8bNnWA03Ns6rPyYPyvgRjx0S6yQH18pQEIUnOkGPcE=)
